command: fabio reflex create-trigger --workspace $WS_ID --name "Flood Alert" --eventhouse-id $EH_ID --database WeatherDB --table StormEvents --condition "State == 'ILLINOIS' and EventType == 'Flood'" --action email --recipients "ops@company.com,alerts@company.com" --interval 120
description: Creates a Reflex item with a fully auto-generated trigger definition. Builds 5 entities (container, event, object, attribute, rule) from simple parameters — no manual JSON crafting required.
notes: The command creates the Reflex item first (LRO), then pushes the auto-generated ReflexEntities.json definition. If the definition push fails (known KQL source limitation), the item is still created and reported with status 'created_but_definition_failed'. Supports --action email or --action teams. Use --dry-run to preview the planned entities without creating anything.

query_examples.description: Get the created Reflex item ID.
